title: ICP Definition
description: Schema for an Ideal Customer Profile used by lead_qualifier.py

name.description: Short label for this ICP (e.g., 'Mid-Market SaaS — Data Team Buyer')

must_have.description: Attributes a lead MUST match. Missing one drops the lead's score significantly.

nice_to_have.description: Attributes that boost the lead at half-weight when matched.

disqualifiers.description: Any match here drops the lead entirely.

field.description: Lead CSV column this rule evaluates (e.g., 'industry', 'size', 'country', 'signals')

value.description: String or array of strings — case-insensitive substring match against the lead's field

min.description: For numeric fields like 'size': minimum acceptable value (inclusive)

max.description: For numeric fields like 'size': maximum acceptable value (inclusive)

weight.description: Relative importance for scoring; defaults to 10 for must-have, 5 for nice-to-have
